title: YouTube Thumbnail Japanese Four Panel Healing Ad Collage
sourceTitle: Youtube Thumbnail Japanese Four Panel Healing Ad Collage

imagePrompts.prompt: {"type":"Japanese promotional social media thumbnail collage","style":"high-impact click-through ad design, glossy and dramatic, four-panel square layout, bold Japanese typography, saturated colors, glow effects, sparkles, gradient overlays, urgency-driven marketing visuals","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"1:1","size":"square"},"layout":{"grid":"2x2","panels":[{"position":"top-left","theme":"anxiety and self-doubt","background":"soft pink and white feminine lifestyle scene with bokeh and light textures","subject":"close-up of a worried young woman in a cozy white knit sweater, one hand near her face, hair tied in a messy bun, face partially obscured","text_blocks":[{"text":"知らないと損！","style":"yellow angled banner with black text","position":"top-left"},{"text":"99%が間違ってる","style":"very large headline, red numerals and black calligraphy-style Japanese text","position":"upper-left to center"},{"text":"その悩みの向き合い方","style":"pink subheadline","position":"below main headline"},{"text":"理由もなくモヤモヤする","style":"checklist item in white rounded box with red check icon"},{"text":"頑張ってるのに変わらない","style":"checklist item in white rounded box with red check icon"},{"text":"自分の本音がわからない","style":"checklist item in white rounded box with red check icon"},{"text":"人間関係で疲れてしまう","style":"checklist item in white rounded box with red check icon"},{"text":"将来が不安で仕方ない","style":"checklist item in white rounded box with red check icon"},{"text":"そのモヤモヤ、一人で抱えなくて大丈夫です。","style":"pink circular badge with white text","position":"lower-right"}],"count":9},{"position":"top-right","theme":"not healing but a mechanism for change","background":"deep cosmic galaxy with blue, purple, and magenta nebula, starburst lights, energy vortex, glowing spiritual atmosphere","subject":"small female figure seen from behind or side, standing near a radiant portal or column of light, face partially obscured","text_blocks":[{"text":"普通に見えて実は…","style":"white text on black angled banner","position":"top-left"},{"text":"これ、","style":"large white text","position":"upper-left"},{"text":"ヒーリング","style":"very large yellow text on dark purple brushstroke","position":"center"},{"text":"じゃありません。","style":"large white text","position":"below"},{"text":"「整える」ことで","style":"white boxed text","position":"lower-left"},{"text":"現実が変わる","style":"pink highlighted text","position":"mid-lower-left"},{"text":"仕組みがあった！","style":"white text","position":"bottom-left"}],"graphic_elements":[{"type":"curved yellow arrow","count":1,"direction":"toward glowing figure"}],"count":8},{"position":"bottom-left","theme":"returning to your true self creates a brighter future","background":"sunny blue sky with soft clouds, green field, floating leaves, bright hopeful daytime mood","subject":"joyful young woman in a sleeveless white dress, arms spread wide, body turning in the sunlight, face partially obscured","text_blocks":[{"text":"本来の自分に戻ると","style":"red and black headline","position":"top"},{"text":"こんな未来に","style":"very large gold gradient headline","position":"center"},{"text":"なります","style":"large black text","position":"right-center"},{"text":"心が軽くなり、毎日が楽しくなる","style":"benefit item in white rounded bubble with pink heart icon"},{"text":"人間関係がスムーズになり、愛で満たされる","style":"benefit item in white rounded bubble with green people icon"},{"text":"お金の流れが変わり、豊かさが自然と入ってくる","style":"benefit item in white rounded bubble with gold yen icon"},{"text":"人生が想像以上に変わり始めます！","style":"pink bottom ribbon with white text","position":"bottom"}],"count":7},{"position":"bottom-right","theme":"limited-time discount offer","background":"fiery red and gold explosion texture with glitter and spark trails, luxury urgency aesthetic","text_blocks":[{"text":"知らないと","style":"yellow brush banner with black text","position":"top-left"},{"text":"損！","style":"extremely large gold kanji with metallic bevel","position":"upper-right"},{"text":"通常価格 9,980円（税込）","style":"white price tag with crossed-out black numerals and small tax note","position":"upper-left"},{"text":"モニター価格","style":"white text","position":"center-left"},{"text":"4割引","style":"huge pink-to-white gradient discount text","position":"center-lower"},{"text":"今だけ 限定募集！ 人数限定","style":"gold circular seal badge","position":"right-center"},{"text":"詳しくはプロフィールから","style":"purple call-to-action bar with white text and white arrow button","position":"bottom"}],"count":7}],"total_panels":4},"composition":"busy, persuasive Japanese ad collage optimized for social media thumbnail visibility, each quadrant has a distinct emotional message and color identity, heavy use of diagonal banners, oversized kanji and numerals, glossy badges, rounded white info boxes, and dramatic lighting","customization":{"primary headline":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"99%が間違ってる\"}","discount text":"{argument name=\"discount text\" default=\"4割引\"}","price":"{argument name=\"price\" default=\"9,980円（税込）\"}","main color palette":"{argument name=\"main color palette\" default=\"pink, blue-purple galaxy, sky blue, red-gold\"}","call to action":"{argument name=\"call to action\" default=\"詳しくはプロフィールから\"}"},"render_notes":"make all Japanese text large and legible, with layered shadows and outlines; use polished ad-composite aesthetics rather than minimalist design; faces should be blurred or partially hidden; emphasize emotional contrast between anxiety, revelation, hopeful transformation, and urgent offer"}

promptTranslations.zh: {"type":"日式促销社交媒体缩略图拼贴","style":"高冲击力点击广告设计，光泽且具有戏剧性，四格方形布局，粗体日文排版，饱和色彩，发光效果，闪光，渐变叠加，紧迫感营销视觉","canvas":{"aspect_ratio":"1:1","size":"square"},"layout":{"grid":"2x2","panels":[{"position":"top-left","theme":"焦虑与自我怀疑","background":"柔和的粉色和白色女性生活方式场景，带有虚化和光影纹理","subject":"特写一名忧虑的年轻女性，身穿舒适的白色针织毛衣，一只手靠近脸部，头发扎成凌乱的丸子头，面部部分遮挡","text_blocks":[{"text":"知らないと損！","style":"黄色斜角横幅，黑色文本","position":"top-left"},{"text":"99%が間違ってる","style":"超大标题，红色数字和黑色书法风格日文文本","position":"左上至中心"},{"text":"その悩みの向き合い方","style":"粉色副标题","position":"主标题下方"},{"text":"理由もなくモヤモヤする","style":"白色圆角框内的清单项，带有红色勾选图标"},{"text":"頑張ってるのに変わらない","style":"白色圆角框内的清单项，带有红色勾选图标"},{"text":"自分の本音がわからない","style":"白色圆角框内的清单项，带有红色勾选图标"},{"text":"人間関係で疲れてしまう","style":"白色圆角框内的清单项，带有红色勾选图标"},{"text":"将来が不安で仕方ない","style":"白色圆角框内的清单项，带有红色勾选图标"},{"text":"そのモヤモヤ、一人で抱えなくて大丈夫です。","style":"粉色圆形徽章，白色文本","position":"右下"}],"count":9},{"position":"top-right","theme":"非治愈，而是改变的机制","background":"深邃的宇宙星系，带有蓝色、紫色和洋红色的星云，星爆光芒，能量漩涡，发光的灵性氛围","subject":"从背后或侧面看到的女性小身影，站在发光的传送门或光柱旁，面部部分遮挡","text_blocks":[{"text":"普通に見えて実は…","style":"黑色斜角横幅上的白色文本","position":"top-left"},{"text":"これ、","style":"大号白色文本","position":"左上"},{"text":"ヒーリング","style":"深紫色笔触上的超大黄色文本","position":"中心"},{"text":"じゃありません。","style":"大号白色文本","position":"下方"},{"text":"「整える」ことで","style":"白色框内文本","position":"左下"},{"text":"現実が変わる","style":"粉色高亮文本","position":"中左下"},{"text":"仕組みがあった！","style":"白色文本","position":"左下"}],"graphic_elements":[{"type":"弯曲黄色箭头","count":1,"direction":"指向发光人物"}],"count":8},{"position":"bottom-left","theme":"回归真我创造更光明的未来","background":"阳光明媚的蓝天白云，绿色田野，漂浮的叶子，明亮充满希望的日间氛围","subject":"身穿无袖白色连衣裙的快乐年轻女性，双臂张开，在阳光下旋转，面部部分遮挡","text_blocks":[{"text":"本来の自分に戻ると","style":"红黑标题","position":"顶部"},{"text":"こんな未来に","style":"超大金色渐变标题","position":"中心"},{"text":"なります","style":"大号黑色文本","position":"右中"},{"text":"心が軽くなり、毎日が楽しくなる","style":"白色圆角气泡内的益处项，带有粉色爱心图标"},{"text":"人間関係がスムーズになり、愛で満たされる","style":"白色圆角气泡内的益处项，带有绿色人物图标"},{"text":"お金の流れが変わり、豊かさが自然と入ってくる","style":"白色圆角气泡内的益处项，带有金色日元图标"},{"text":"人生が想像以上に変わり始めます！","style":"粉色底部丝带，白色文本","position":"底部"}],"count":7},{"position":"bottom-right","theme":"限时折扣优惠","background":"炽热的红金爆炸纹理，带有闪粉和火花轨迹，奢华紧迫感美学","text_blocks":[{"text":"知らないと","style":"黄色笔触横幅，黑色文本","position":"左上"},{"text":"損！","style":"带有金属斜面的超大金色汉字","position":"右上"},{"text":"通常価格 9,980円（税込）","style":"白色价格标签，带有划掉的黑色数字和小型税费说明","position":"左上"},{"text":"モニター価格","style":"白色文本","position":"中左"},{"text":"4割引","style":"巨大的粉白渐变折扣文本","position":"中下"},{"text":"今だけ 限定募集！ 人数限定","style":"金色圆形印章徽章","position":"右中"},{"text":"詳しくはプロフィールから","style":"紫色行动呼吁栏，白色文本和白色箭头按钮","position":"底部"}],"count":7}],"total_panels":4},"composition":"繁忙、具有说服力的日式广告拼贴，针对社交媒体缩略图可见性进行了优化，每个象限都有独特的感性信息和色彩标识，大量使用对角线横幅、超大汉字和数字、光泽徽章、圆角白色信息框以及戏剧性的灯光","customization":{"primary headline":"{argument name=\"headline text\" default=\"99%が間違ってる\"}","discount text":"{argument name=\"discount text\" default=\"4割引\"}","price":"{argument name=\"price\" default=\"9,980円（税込）\"}","main color palette":"{argument name=\"main color palette\" default=\"粉色, 蓝紫色星系, 天蓝色, 红金色\"}","call to action":"{argument name=\"call to action\" default=\"詳しくはプロフィールから\"}"},"render_notes":"使所有日文文本大而清晰，带有分层阴影和轮廓；使用精美的广告合成美学而非极简设计；面部应模糊或部分隐藏；强调焦虑、启示、希望的转变和紧急优惠之间的情感对比"}
